creator: oliver@akephalos.de
text:
Hi,

I hope this is the proper information. I have a kernel with debug
symbols and vmcore files  (about 116Mb) in /var/crash.

Oliver

--------------

Unread portion of the kernel message buffer:


Fatal trap 12: page fault while in kernel mode
cpuid = 1; apic id = 01
fault virtual address	= 0x12
fault code		= supervisor read, page not present
instruction pointer	= 0x20:0xc06bb18a
stack pointer	        = 0x28:0xef0fabe4
frame pointer	        = 0x28:0xef0fabfc
code segment		= base 0x0, limit 0xfffff, type 0x1b
			= DPL 0, pres 1, def32 1, gran 1
processor eflags	= interrupt enabled, resume, IOPL = 0
current process		= 27 (irq22: ehci0+)
trap number		= 12
panic: page fault
cpuid = 1
Uptime: 11m30s
Physical memory: 3051 MB
Dumping 116 MB: 101 85 69 53 37 21 5

#0  doadump () at pcpu.h:195
195	pcpu.h: No such file or directory.
	in pcpu.h
(kgdb) where
#0  doadump () at pcpu.h:195
#1  0xc07557c7 in boot (howto=260) at
/usr/src/sys/kern/kern_shutdown.c:409
#2  0xc0755a89 in panic (fmt=Variable "fmt" is not available.
) at /usr/src/sys/kern/kern_shutdown.c:563
#3  0xc0a48aec in trap_fatal (frame=0xef0faba4, eva=18) at
/usr/src/sys/i386/i386/trap.c:899
#4  0xc0a48d50 in trap_pfault (frame=0xef0faba4, usermode=0, eva=18) at
/usr/src/sys/i386/i386/trap.c:812
#5  0xc0a496d2 in trap (frame=0xef0faba4) at
/usr/src/sys/i386/i386/trap.c:490
#6  0xc0a3004b in calltrap () at /usr/src/sys/i386/i386/exception.s:139
#7  0xc06bb18a in rum_txeof (xfer=0xc6f22000, priv=0xc6cb0498,
status=USBD_NORMAL_COMPLETION) at /usr/src/sys/dev/usb/if_rum.c:843
#8  0xc06d49f5 in usb_transfer_complete (xfer=0xc6f22000) at
/usr/src/sys/dev/usb/usbdi.c:977
#9  0xc06a75a1 in ehci_softintr (v=0xc6c20000) at
/usr/src/sys/dev/usb/ehci.c:884
#10 0xc06d0572 in usb_schedsoftintr (bus=0xc6c20000) at
/usr/src/sys/dev/usb/usb.c:844
#11 0xc06a8d7e in ehci_intr1 (sc=0xc6c20000) at
/usr/src/sys/dev/usb/ehci.c:603
#12 0xc06a97b5 in ehci_intr (v=0xc6c20000) at
/usr/src/sys/dev/usb/ehci.c:562
#13 0xc07389fb in ithread_loop (arg=0xc6c96920) at
/usr/src/sys/kern/kern_intr.c:1036
#14 0xc07357f9 in fork_exit (callout=0xc0738850 <ithread_loop>,
arg=0xc6c96920, frame=0xef0fad38) at /usr/src/sys/kern/kern_fork.c:781
#15 0xc0a300c0 in fork_trampoline () at
/usr/src/sys/i386/i386/exception.s:205
-- 
To refuse praise is to seek praise twice.
